sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Chatterton & Associates Inc.'s Schwab US Aggregate Bond ETF(SCHZ) Holding History
feed.summary: Chatterton & Associates Inc. holds 232,291 shares of Schwab US Aggregate Bond ETF (SCHZ), valued at $5.41 million as of March 31, 2026, representing 3.79% of their stock portfolio. This position was established with a single purchase in Q4 2025 at an average price of $23.46 per share. Based on the current SCHZ price of $23.14, the firm has an estimated unrealized loss of $74,119.80, or -1.36%.

feed.title: OneSpan Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: OneSpan Inc. reported its first-quarter 2026 financial results, with total revenue increasing 4% year-over-year to $65.9 million and subscription revenue growing 8% to $52.7 million. The company also announced the acquisition of Build38 to strengthen its cybersecurity offerings and updated its full-year 2026 financial guidance, increasing its ARR expectations. OneSpan's CEO highlighted solid profitability and subscription revenue growth and emphasized continued focus on efficient growth, strong profitability, cash generation, and returning capital to shareholders.

feed.title: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Lowers Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) Price Target to $235.00
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has reduced its price target for Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) to $235.00 from $246.00, maintaining a "market perform" rating, despite AJG reporting stronger-than-expected Q1 earnings with a 29% revenue increase. The adjustment reflects mixed analyst views, insider sales, and valuation concerns, even as the company guides for 6% organic growth in FY2026 and raises its synergy target for AssuredPartners. Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts, with an average target price of $271.82.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Increases Schneider National (NYSE:SNDR) Price Target to $33.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has raised its price target for Schneider National (NYSE:SNDR) to $33.00, up from $25.00, while maintaining an "equal weight" rating. This adjustment implies a potential upside of approximately 3.3% from the stock's previous close. Despite beating Q1 EPS estimates, the company missed revenue expectations and provided full-year guidance that may impact its near-term valuation, though a $150 million share buyback and a $.10 quarterly dividend were also announced.

feed.title: Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) Earns "Overweight" Rating from Cantor Fitzgerald
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has reissued an "Overweight" rating for Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR), setting a $211 price target, which suggests a 5.1% upside. This aligns with a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts, with some firms even raising targets to the $215-$235 range. The company reported Q1 EPS of $0.46 and revenue of $1.64 billion, meeting estimates, and provided FY2026 EPS guidance of $7.95-$8.05.

feed.title: Bank of America Denied Quick Appeal Over 401(k) Forfeiture Use
feed.summary: Bank of America Corp. has been denied an immediate appeal regarding a decision that requires it to defend its handling of 401(k) contributions forfeited by employees. A judge ruled that the case depends on the specific terms of the bank's 401(k) plan document, not a narrow legal issue, meaning it will proceed to discovery. The legal proceedings will investigate how expenses and forfeitures were applied and how fiduciaries exercised their discretion within the plan.

feed.title: EOG Resources to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What Investors Should Know
feed.summary: EOG Resources (EOG) is scheduled to report its first-quarter 2026 earnings on May 5th, with analysts expecting an increase in EPS and revenues. The company's strong production in premier oil shale plays and the positive impact of higher commodity prices, especially from the United States-Iran conflict, are factors anticipated to drive strong quarterly performance. EOG currently has a Zacks Rank #2 and an Earnings ESP of +7.62%, indicating a likely earnings beat.

feed.title: AIG Q1 2026 slides: EPS surges 80% on strong underwriting gains
feed.summary: American International Group Inc. (AIG) reported an "outstanding" Q1 2026, with adjusted EPS surging 80% year-over-year to $2.11, significantly beating analyst estimates. The strong performance was driven by remarkable underwriting gains in its General Insurance segment, with net premiums written increasing by 24% and the combined ratio improving by 850 basis points to 87.3%. AIG also announced a strategic investment in Convex Group Limited and continued capital returns to shareholders, including a doubled dividend and share repurchases.

feed.title: Applovin Corp Stock (APP) Moved Up by 3.22% on May 1: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Applovin Corp (APP) stock experienced a 3.22% increase on May 1st, driven by anticipation for its upcoming Q1 2026 earnings report and positive analyst revisions to revenue estimates. The company's AI-driven advertising engine is a key factor cited by analysts for its growth potential, with strong "Buy" ratings and substantial price targets. Technical indicators show a buy signal from MACD, though RSI and Williams %R suggest neutral to oversold conditions amidst intraday volatility.

feed.title: Shopify Inc Stock (SHOP) Moved Up by 4.04% on May 1: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Shopify Inc (SHOP) stock surged by 4.04% on May 1st, driven by strong investor anticipation ahead of its Q1 2026 financial results, which are expected to show robust profit and revenue growth. The company's underlying business fundamentals, including GMV growth, Shopify Payments expansion, international presence, and advancements in AI integration and commerce standards, are contributing to investor confidence despite concerns about valuation and growth moderation. Analysts maintain a positive outlook, expecting an implied upside for the stock.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil shares slip after net income falls sharply despite earnings beat
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil's shares declined after its first-quarter 2026 GAAP net income dropped significantly year-over-year to $4.18 billion, despite beating adjusted earnings and revenue forecasts. Geopolitical conflicts in the Middle East and associated timing effects contributed to the net income reduction. The company highlighted strong operational performance in its upstream portfolio, including record production in Guyana, and returned $9.2 billion to shareholders.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Constellation Energy Price Target to $386 From $400
feed.summary: JPMorgan has lowered its price target for Constellation Energy (CEG) to $386 from $400. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for the company, indicating potential changes in market sentiment or financial outlook for the energy producer. Constellation Energy specializes in clean, zero-carbon energy production, providing nuclear, hydroelectric, wind, and solar power solutions.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Lennox International Price Target to $522 From $493
feed.summary: JPMorgan has adjusted its price target for Lennox International (LII) shares to $522, down from the previous $493. This change in price target was published from MT Newswires on May 1, 2026. The company, a provider of climate control solutions, had recently reported its Q1 2026 earnings with adjusted earnings falling but net sales rising.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Jumps 8.7% to $326.24
authors: AlphaStreet Newsdesk powered by AlphaStreet Intelligence
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) surged 8.7% to $326.24, driven by strong earnings and a strategic restructuring plan that includes job cuts. The exchange operator, a leader in S&P 500 options trading, saw significant trading activity and now boasts a market capitalization of $34.2 billion. Investors are encouraged to monitor the execution of the restructuring plan and potential M&A developments.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (CHD) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
feed.summary: Church & Dwight (CHD) reported strong Q1 2026 results, with net sales up 0.2% and organic sales growing 5%, driven primarily by volume and distribution gains. The company exceeded its EPS forecast and expanded its adjusted gross margin despite facing incremental inflation pressures from the Middle East conflict. Management reiterated its full-year 2026 outlook, confident in its productivity initiatives and strategic portfolio actions to offset rising costs without increasing consumer prices.

feed.title: Kenvue seeks dismissal of class action alleging baby oil misrepresents ingredients
feed.summary: Kenvue is seeking the dismissal of a class action lawsuit claiming its Johnson's brand baby oil misleads consumers about the amount of shea and cocoa butter it contains. Plaintiff Michael Douma alleges the product labeling misleadingly suggests the baby oil is primarily made with these butters, while Kenvue argues the label accurately describes it as an "oil" enriched with the ingredients, and that reasonable consumers read ingredient lists. The company further contends that Douma fails to allege a cognizable injury or plausible deception.

feed.title: IDEAYA Biosciences to Initiate New Drug Application Submission from the Darovasertib OptimUM-02 Trial under the Oncology Center of Excellence Real-time Oncology Review (RTOR) Program
feed.summary: IDEAYA Biosciences announced that the FDA has agreed to review its New Drug Application (NDA) for darovasertib in combination with crizotinib for patients with first-line HLA*A2-negative metastatic uveal melanoma (mUM) under the Real-Time Oncology Review (RTOR) program. The decision follows positive topline data from the Phase 2/3 OptimUM-02 trial, which met its primary endpoint by significantly improving progression-free survival. The company plans to initiate the RTOR submission process in May, with the full NDA filing expected in the second half of 2026, aiming to expedite the availability of this potential new treatment.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 7.51% stake in Tyson Foods (NYSE: TSN) via Schedule 13G
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing a 7.51% beneficial ownership stake in Tyson Foods Inc. (NYSE: TSN) as of March 31, 2026. This ownership includes 21,194,882 shares with sole dispositive power, while sole voting power is held over 2,878,235 shares. The filing indicates these holdings are for Vanguard funds and managed accounts.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering Capped Buffered Equity Notes linked to the iShares MSCI EAFE ETF, designed for investors seeking appreciation up to a maximum return of at least 11.75% at maturity. The notes are unsecured obligations guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. and involve risks including potential loss of principal, credit risk, and market volatility.

feed.title: FlexShares Credit-Scored US Corporate Bond Index Fund (NASDAQ:SKOR) Announces Monthly Dividend of $0.19
feed.summary: FlexShares Credit-Scored US Corporate Bond Index Fund (NASDAQ:SKOR) has declared a monthly dividend of $0.1885 per share, payable on May 7th to shareholders of record as of May 1st. This dividend translates to an annualized yield of 4.7%. The fund, which tracks intermediate-maturity, investment-grade U.S. corporate bonds, saw its shares trade down 0.2% to $48.53 on Friday.

feed.title: American International Group, Inc. (NYSE:AIG) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.50
feed.summary: American International Group (NYSE:AIG) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share, an 11.1% increase from its previous dividend, payable on June 29th to shareholders of record on June 15th. This dividend increase follows strong first-quarter results, where the company reported adjusted EPS of $2.11, significantly beating estimates, driven by a surge in underwriting income in its General Insurance unit. The company's stock rose 5.7% to $79.05 on the news, reflecting investor confidence in AIG's financial performance and strategic direction.

feed.title: Globe Life Inc. (NYSE:GL) Plans $0.33 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc. (NYSE:GL) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.33 per share, payable on July 31st to shareholders of record on July 6th, representing an annualized yield of 0.9%. The company has consistently raised dividends for 20 years and maintains a low payout ratio. Despite missing Q1 EPS estimates slightly, Globe Life reported revenue growth of 5.3% and analysts have a consensus "Buy" rating with an average price target of $172.67.

feed.title: Water bills could more than double by 2050; Pa. utility plans $631M
feed.summary: Pennsylvania American Water (AWK) announced plans to invest $631 million in 2026 for infrastructure upgrades, highlighting a new AWWA report stating that $2.1–$2.4 trillion is needed nationally over 25 years for U.S. drinking water systems. The company stressed the increasing complexity of water delivery and rising affordability pressures, warning that household water bills could more than double by 2050 if funding relies mainly on rate increases. They advocate for a balanced approach, utilizing financing tools like State Revolving Funds (SRF) and the Water Infrastructure Finance and Innovation Act (WIFIA) to support investments while managing customer costs.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher (NYSE: TMO) grows Q1 revenue and closes $9.1B Clario deal
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific reported robust Q1 2026 results, with revenue growing 6% year-over-year to $11.01 billion, driven by strong performance in its Laboratory Products and Biopharma Services and Life Sciences Solutions segments. The company also completed the acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc. for $9.1 billion, expanding its clinical research offerings, and announced plans to sell its microbiology business for approximately $1.08 billion, further optimizing its portfolio. Strategic capital deployment included $3.0 billion in stock repurchases and $162 million in dividends, alongside ongoing restructuring efforts to enhance efficiency.

feed.title: PPG (PPG) CEO Timothy Knavish awarded new phantom stock units in plan
feed.summary: PPG Industries Chairman and CEO Timothy M. Knavish was granted 4.3543 Phantom Stock Units on April 30, 2026, as part of a deferred compensation plan. These units, valued at $108.50 each, increase his total holdings to 12,417.8996 units. The phantom units convert to actual PPG common stock on a one-for-one basis once his employment with the company concludes, representing interests in an unfunded unitized company stock fund.

feed.title: A. O. Smith (NYSE: AOS) director receives 2,296 deferred RSUs
feed.summary: A. O. Smith (NYSE: AOS) director Aaron W. Saak received a grant of 2,296 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 23, 2026, as compensation. He has elected to defer the receipt of these RSUs, which have a reference price of $65.34 per unit. Following this grant, Saak directly holds 2,296 RSUs.

feed.title: PPG Industries (NYSE: PPG) awards phantom stock units to senior VP
feed.summary: PPG Industries senior vice president Anne M. Foulkes was granted 0.6814 Phantom Stock Units, valued at $108.50 per unit. These units, which convert to common stock after employment termination, are part of PPG's Deferred Compensation Plan and bring her total holdings to 766.4958 Phantom Stock Units. The grant reflects deferred, stock-based compensation rather than a market purchase.

feed.title: Moderna Q1 Earnings: Revenue Beat Overshadowed By Litigation Charge, Pipeline Drives Outlook
feed.summary: Moderna (MRNA) reported strong Q1 2026 revenue, exceeding expectations due to international COVID-19 vaccine sales, and reiterated its 2026 revenue growth guidance. Despite improved cost discipline, a significant $0.9 billion litigation charge led to a wider net loss and negative gross margins. The company's future outlook is largely dependent on its pipeline, particularly the mRNA-1010 flu vaccine's upcoming FDA decision and late-stage oncology trials, which currently drive a premium valuation for the stock despite near-term profitability uncertainties.

feed.title: Textron Aviation delivers 37 jets in first quarter as revenues hit $1.5bn
feed.summary: Textron Aviation saw its first-quarter revenues increase by 22% year-over-year to $1.5 billion, delivering 37 jets and 35 commercial turboprops, up from the previous year. The company's backlog reached $8.0 billion. Additionally, Textron announced plans to spin off its industrial segment within 12-18 months to become a pure-play aerospace and defense company.

feed.title: PPG Industries (NYSE: PPG) senior VP awarded new phantom stock units
feed.summary: PPG Industries' Senior VP of Operations, Kevin D. Braun, received a grant of 7.8962 phantom stock units valued at $108.50 per unit, increasing his total holdings to 871.4703 units. These units, part of a deferred compensation plan, convert to common stock on a one-for-one basis after his employment with PPG ends. The phantom units represent interests in an unfunded unitized company stock fund, whose value can fluctuate with PPG's stock and cash in the fund.

feed.title: Robert Fauber reports sale of 7,847 shares (MCO) on Form 144
feed.summary: Robert Fauber, an insider at Moody's Corp (MCO), reported sales of 7,847 shares across four transactions between February and April 2026, totaling approximately $3.62 million in proceeds. These sales were documented on Form 144 and included shares related to restricted stock vesting and prior option grants from 2017 and 2018. The filing indicates a neutral sentiment and impact on the company.

feed.title: Linde Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: Linde plc announced its first quarter 2026 financial results, providing a press release and financial tables for review. The company, a global leader in industrial gases and engineering with 2025 sales of $34 billion, highlighted its mission to enhance productivity and sustainability across various industries. This report details its financial performance and ongoing commitment to high-quality solutions and technologies.

feed.title: Bristol Myers’ legacy lift, Biogen’s blue skies and Regeneron’s murky outlook
feed.summary: This article examines the latest quarterly earnings from Bristol Myers Squibb, Biogen, and Regeneron, highlighting investor reactions and future outlooks. Bristol Myers saw a solid quarter driven by older drugs, with significant pipeline catalysts anticipated later in the year. Biogen outperformed expectations due to newer drugs, suggesting an end to a tumultuous period, while Regeneron's shares fell despite exceeding forecasts, primarily due to issues with its Eylea HD launch and a setback in its cancer immunotherapy pipeline.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Bank Of Montreal (TSX:BMO) After A 61% One Year Rally?
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (TSX:BMO) has seen a 61% rally over the past year, prompting investors to question its current valuation. According to Simply Wall St's Excess Returns model, the stock appears undervalued by 26.4%, with an intrinsic value of CA$281.15 against a current price of CA$206.84. However, its P/E ratio of 16.93x is higher than the industry average, suggesting it might be slightly overvalued on that metric.

feed.title: Dominion Energy proposes increasing monthly rates by $17 in North Carolina
feed.summary: Dominion Energy has proposed a rate increase that would raise monthly bills for residential customers in North Carolina by $17, if approved by the North Carolina Utilities Commission. The company stated the proposal is aimed at further investing in reliable and clean energy options and reflects rising costs of grid equipment due to inflation, while claiming their residential rates remain below the national average. Public hearings will be held by the state utility commission to review the proposed hike.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Automatic Data Processing (ADP), Fair Isaac (FICO) and Waystar Holding Corp. (WAY)
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of recent analyst ratings for three technology companies: Automatic Data Processing (ADP), Fair Isaac (FICO), and Waystar Holding Corp. (WAY). BMO Capital maintained a Hold rating on ADP, while Fair Isaac received a Buy rating from BMO Capital and a Strong Buy consensus. Waystar Holding Corp. was maintained as a Buy by Evercore ISI and holds a Strong Buy analyst consensus.

feed.title: Align Tech Announces $200 Million Share Repurchase Plan
feed.summary: Align Technology (ALGN) has announced a new $200 million share repurchase plan, indicating confidence in its long-term growth and financial health. The buyback will be executed through open market transactions under a Rule 10b5-1 plan, funded by the company's existing cash reserves, and is expected to conclude by October 2026. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates ALGN as Outperform, citing strong fundamentals despite some concerns about valuation and margin compression.

feed.title: Why Is Moderna Stock Falling Friday? - Moderna (NASDAQ:MRNA)
feed.summary: Moderna's stock fell on Friday despite beating revenue expectations, primarily due to a litigation settlement charge that led to a net loss. The company reported a narrower-than-expected adjusted loss and higher-than-forecast revenue, driven by increased COVID vaccine sales internationally. Moderna reiterated its goal for significant revenue growth into 2026 and highlighted advancements in its pipeline, including a Phase 3 study for an H5 pandemic influenza vaccine candidate.

feed.title: Grupo Simec delays annual report amid FX hit
feed.summary: Grupo Simec has delayed its 2025 annual report (Form 20-F) due to a need for additional disclosure and control procedures, though they expect to file within the 15-day extension period. The company reported an 86% plunge in net income, primarily influenced by adverse foreign exchange movements from the Mexican peso appreciating against the U.S. dollar, while core operating income and EBITDA remained stable. Despite a drop in net sales, gross margin improved, indicating healthy underlying profitability, and TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates SIM as Neutral due to strong solvency but weakening cash generation.

feed.title: EDGAR Filing Documents for 0001628280-26-029075
feed.summary: This document is an EDGAR filing detail for a Form 10-Q (Quarterly Report) submitted by SL Green Realty Corp and SL Green Operating Partnership, L.P. The report, filed on May 1, 2026, covers the period ending March 31, 2026, and includes various exhibits and interactive data documents. It also provides corporate identification details for both filers.

feed.title: Proto Labs: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Proto Labs Inc. (PRLB) reported a first-quarter profit of $8.1 million, or 33 cents per share. Adjusted earnings were 54 cents per share, with total revenue reaching $139.3 million. The company forecasts its per-share earnings for the current quarter ending in June to be between 50 cents and 58 cents.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Science Applications International (SAIC) Could Change Following New US$75M Navy Task Order
feed.summary: Science Applications International (SAIC) was awarded a new US$75.20 million task order by the General Services Administration in April 2026, primarily for engineering and analytics support for the Naval Air Systems Command. While this contract strengthens SAIC's relationship with the Navy and supports its digital modernization narrative, it is a modest sum compared to the company's annual sales and may not significantly alter near-term catalysts. Investors should also be aware of potential risks from increased government budget scrutiny.

feed.title: Park Hotels & Resorts Inc To Go Ex-Dividend On June 30th, 2026 With 0.25 USD Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: This article announces that Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: PK) will go ex-dividend on June 30th, 2026. Shareholders will receive a dividend of 0.25 USD per share. This is an important date for investors as they need to own the shares before the ex-dividend date to be eligible for the payment.

feed.title: Johnson Fistel Investigates Potential Board Fiduciary Duty Breaches in the Select Medical Take-Private Transaction
feed.summary: Johnson Fistel, PLLP has initiated an investigation into potential breaches of fiduciary duties by the board members of Select Medical Holdings Corporation (NYSE: SEM) concerning its proposed sale. The firm is examining whether the board conducted a fair process to maximize shareholder value and if minority shareholders are receiving fair consideration for their shares in the take-private transaction. Shareholders can join the investigation if they believe the $16.50 per share offer undervalues their investment.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal stock consolidates as price hovers near C$210.50 resistance
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (BMO) stock is consolidating near the C$210.50 resistance, trading at C$207.89, up 0.51% today, and showing bullish momentum above key moving averages. Technical indicators are mixed, with some showing overbought conditions and buyer dominance, while others indicate moderate trend strength. Experts predict the stock will likely trade within the C$205.00 to C$210.50 range, with a potential for further upside if momentum strengthens to break the C$210.50 resistance.

feed.title: XCF Global maintains CORSIA-ready certification at New Rise Renewables Reno
feed.summary: XCF Global has announced that it has maintained its CORSIA-ready certification for New Rise Renewables Reno. This certification is crucial for reporting sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) production under international carbon reduction schemes. The article also mentions various related stories about earnings reports from Neste, Valero, and PBF, along with updates on a Kentucky SAF tax credit and upcoming industry events.

feed.title: Safehold (NYSE:SAFE) Stock Price Down 6.8% on Disappointing Earnings
feed.summary: Safehold (NYSE:SAFE) shares fell by 6.8% after reporting quarterly earnings of $0.40 per share, missing analysts' estimates of $0.43, despite revenue exceeding expectations at $110.85 million. The company recently paid a quarterly dividend of $0.177, representing a 4.8% yield. Analyst ratings are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $19.25.

feed.title: Schwab high yield bond ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.1449
feed.summary: The Schwab High Yield Bond ETF (SCHP) has declared a monthly distribution of $0.1449 per share. This declaration provides investors with a consistent income stream from the ETF's holdings.

feed.title: Bank of America Maintains Buy Rating on Nvidia Corp. (NVDA)
feed.summary: Bank of America Securities has reiterated its Buy rating on Nvidia Corp. (NVDA), highlighting the company's strong performance with an 83.23% gain over the past year. The article notes that 91% of analysts give Nvidia a Buy rating, citing its innovation in AI models and significant growth in data center revenue, driven by increasing demand for AI computing.

feed.title: Sonic Automotive (NYSE: SAH) director granted 4,373 RSUs, expanding holdings
feed.summary: Sonic Automotive director Bryan Scott Smith was granted 4,373 restricted stock units (RSUs) at a price of $0.00 per share under the company's 2012 Formula Restricted Stock and Deferral Plan for Non-Employee Directors. This grant expands his direct holdings to 401,830 shares of Class A Common Stock. Smith also indirectly holds 836,534 shares through OBS Family, LLC, disclaiming beneficial ownership except for his pecuniary interest.
